name: trolley-scout
title: Trolley Scout
description: Read-only MCP tools for South African grocery deals, nearby supermarkets, flash deals, and money help (SASSA grants and more). No authentication required.

tools.name: search_deals
tools.description: Search this week's verified South African grocery specials by keyword and/or retailer.

tools.name: nearby_stores
tools.description: Find supermarkets near a latitude/longitude and their current specials.

tools.name: flash_deals
tools.description: Browse flash/daily deals from OneDayOnly, Hyperli, Daddy's Deals and MyRunway.

tools.name: money_help
tools.description: Current South African social grant amounts (SASSA) and money-saving help.
